management.deleteExpertConfirm: Delete expert {{name}} and its fixed file structure?
management.searchExperts: Search experts by name, ID, or expertise
management.validationDescription: Check dependency links, dependency cycles, and whether upstream artifact mappings match real expert outputs.
management.validationDescriptionSelected: Showing dependency findings related to {{expert}} while still reflecting the global expert graph.
management.validationEmpty: Run dependency validation to inspect the expert graph.
management.validationNoFindings: No dependency findings in the current scope.
management.validationLoadError: Failed to load dependency validation results.
management.validationIssuesFound: Dependency validation found issues that need attention.
management.validationSummaryDescription: Run one unified check for the full expert graph, including dependencies, phase ordering, and artifact mappings, with actionable optimization guidance.

dependencyRecommendations.missingPhaseBinding: Assign this expert to a concrete execution phase, then rerun the overall dependency validation.
dependencyRecommendations.backwardPhaseDependency: Move the dependency into an earlier phase or refactor the edge so dependencies only point to earlier phases.
dependencyRecommendations.dependencyCycle: Break the cycle into a one-way dependency chain, or extract shared outputs into an earlier common expert.
dependencyRecommendations.missingDependency: Replace the reference with a real expert ID, or remove the invalid dependency/upstream mapping.
dependencyRecommendations.missingUpstreamArtifactMapping: Add `upstream_artifacts` for this dependency and declare only the upstream artifacts the expert really consumes.
dependencyRecommendations.upstreamNotInDependencies: Keep `upstream_artifacts` aligned with `dependencies`: either add the dependency or remove the extra mapping.
dependencyRecommendations.unknownUpstreamArtifact: Change the mapped artifact names to files that actually exist in the upstream expert `expected_outputs`.
dependencyRecommendations.upstreamHasNoExpectedOutputs: If this upstream is intentional, add `expected_outputs` to it first; otherwise remove the artifact mapping.
dependencyRecommendations.emptyUpstreamArtifactMapping: An empty upstream artifact mapping is not useful; add concrete artifact names or remove the mapping.
dependencyRecommendations.boundaryInputMismatch: Align `boundary_upstream_inputs` with `scheduling.dependencies` so the boundary contract matches orchestration.
dependencyRecommendations.duplicateExpectedOutput: Avoid multiple experts producing the same file name; standardize naming or consolidate the shared output into one upstream expert.
dependencyRecommendations.selfDependency: Remove self-dependencies and self-references; upstream relationships should only point to other experts.
dependencyRecommendations.duplicatePhaseAssignment: Ensure each expert belongs to exactly one phase and is not mounted multiple times in phase orchestration.
dependencyRecommendations.default: Fix this dependency definition first, then rerun the overall validation to confirm the graph and artifact mappings are aligned.

management.phaseOrchestrationDescription: Manage the stage-to-expert mapping stored in phases.yaml. Each expert can belong to only one phase at a time, and saved changes immediately affect validation and runtime orchestration.
management.phaseOrchestrationNoUnassigned: All orchestratable experts are already assigned to phases.
management.phaseOrchestrationEmptyPhase: No experts are configured for this phase yet.
management.phaseOrchestrationSelectExpert: Select an expert to add to this phase
management.phaseOrchestrationPlannerHint: The planning phase is occupied by the system planner and does not host regular experts.
management.phaseOrchestrationReadonlyHint: This is a read-only phase and does not accept expert assignments.
